faq.q1: Как работает удаление звука из видео?
faq.a1: Инструмент удаляет звуковую дорожку из видео, сохраняя качество видео. Перекодирование не требуется.
faq.a2: Поддерживаются большинство распространённых форматов, включая MP4, WebM, MOV и AVI.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: Нет. Вся обработка происходит полностью в вашем браузере. Ваши данные никогда не покидают ваше устройство — ничего не загружается на сервер.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: Что такое Mute Video?
intro.content:
Mute Video removes the audio track from video files while keeping the video quality intact. Create silent versions of videos for background loops, presentations, or social media posts where audio isn't needed.

Powered by FFmpeg.wasm — full video processing running locally in your browser.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Mute Video
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file (MP4, WebM, MKV, AVI supported)
  2. Click Mute to remove the audio track
  3. Download the silent video

The video stream is copied without re-encoding, so processing is fast and quality is preserved.

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Audio Track Removal: Completely strips audio while keeping video untouched
  • No Re-encoding: Video stream is copied directly — no quality loss
  • Fast Processing: Stream copy is much faster than re-encoding
  • Multiple Formats: Supports MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI input
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Industry-standard video processing in your browser
  • Preview: Play the video before and after muting

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Presentations: Remove distracting audio from background videos in slides
  • Social Media: Create silent looping videos for Instagram or TikTok backgrounds
  • Web Design: Prepare silent hero videos for website backgrounds
  • Privacy: Remove conversations or identifiable audio from recordings
  • Video Editing: Strip audio before replacing with a different soundtrack

privacy.title: Обработка с защитой конфиденциальности Video Processing
privacy.content:
Video processing runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm (WebAssembly).

  • Your videos never leave your device — no server uploads
  • No cloud processing or third-party access to your media
  • Работает в автономном режиме после FFmpeg core is loaded

intro.title: Что такое Trim Video?
intro.content:
Trim Video cuts video clips to your desired length with precise start and end time controls. Set times down to 0.1-second precision, preview the selection, and download the trimmed clip.

Uses FFmpeg.wasm for professional-grade video trimming прямо в вашем браузере.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Trim Video
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file
  2. Set the start time and end time for the clip you want to keep
  3. Preview the selected range in the video player
  4. Click Trim to extract the clip
  5. Download the trimmed video

Supports precise time selection with 0.1-second increments.

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Precise Timing: Set start and end times with 0.1-second accuracy
  • Video Preview: Play the selected range before trimming
  • Fast Processing: Stream copy mode for instant trimming without re-encoding
  • Multiple Formats: Supports MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional video processing in the browser
  • Quality Preservation: No quality loss when stream copying

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Social Media Clips: Cut highlights from longer videos for social platforms
  • Meeting Recordings: Extract key moments from recorded meetings
  • Content Creation: Trim raw footage to create polished clips
  • Presentations: Cut video clips to exact lengths for presentations
  • Personal Videos: Trim home videos to keep the best moments

intro.title: Что такое Video to GIF?
intro.content:
Video to GIF converts video clips into animated GIF images with control over frame rate, resolution, and quality. Create shareable GIFs from any video for social media, chat, or documentation.

Powered by FFmpeg.wasm for high-quality GIF generation прямо в вашем браузере.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Video to GIF
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file
  2. Set the start and end time for the GIF clip
  3. Adjust frame rate (fps) and output width
  4. Click Convert to generate the GIF
  5. Preview and download the animated GIF

Lower frame rates and smaller widths produce smaller GIF files.

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Frame Rate Control: Set GIF frame rate (e.g., 10, 15, 24 fps)
  • Size Control: Adjust output width for file size optimization
  • Time Selection: Choose which part of the video to convert
  • Preview: See the GIF before downloading
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: High-quality palette generation for optimal GIF colors
  • Multiple Input Formats: Convert from MP4, WebM, MKV, AVI

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Social Media: Create reaction GIFs or highlights from videos
  • Documentation: Create animated demonstrations for tutorials or docs
  • Chat & Messaging: Make custom GIFs for group chats and Slack
  • Bug Reports: Record and share animated bug reproductions
  • Marketing: Create eye-catching animated content for campaigns

intro.title: Что такое Video to WebP?
intro.content:
Video to WebP converts video clips into animated WebP images. WebP animations are 25-35% smaller than equivalent GIFs with better color reproduction and transparency support.

The modern alternative to GIFs for web use.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Video to WebP
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file
  2. Set the start and end time for the animation clip
  3. Adjust frame rate and output dimensions
  4. Click Convert to generate the animated WebP
  5. Download the WebP animation

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Smaller Than GIF: WebP animations are 25-35% smaller than equivalent GIFs
  • Better Colors: Full 24-bit color depth (vs. GIF's 256 color limit)
  • Transparency: Alpha channel support for transparent animations
  • Frame Rate Control: Adjustable fps for size optimization
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional encoding in the browser
  • Wide Browser Support: Supported by all modern browsers

compress.name: Сжать видео
compress.description: Reduce video file size with quality presets or advanced controls for CRF, resolution, frame rate, and bitrate.
compress.metaTitle: Compress Video Online Free - Advanced Video Compressor | No Upload
compress.metaDescription: Compress videos in your browser with no upload. Choose simple presets or advanced mode with CRF, resolution, FPS, and bitrate controls. H.264 MP4 output. 100% private.
compress.keywords: compress video, video compressor, reduce video size, shrink video, CRF compression, video bitrate reducer, browser video compressor, no upload video compress
compress.unsupported: Для этого инструмента требуется поддержка SharedArrayBuffer. Используйте современный браузер с HTTPS.
compress.highDesc: Minimal compression with near-original visual quality. Moderate file size reduction.
compress.highUseCase: Best for: Social media, presentations, archiving
compress.mediumDesc: Balanced compression. Good visual quality with significant size reduction.
compress.mediumUseCase: Best for: Email attachments, general sharing
compress.lowDesc: Maximum compression. Noticeably reduced quality, smallest file size.
compress.lowUseCase: Best for: Messaging apps, quick previews, low bandwidth
compress.crfHint: 0 = lossless, 23 = high quality, 28 = medium, 51 = worst. Lower values produce larger files.
compress.encodingPresetHint: Slower encoding produces smaller files at the same quality level.
compress.maxBitrateHint: Cap the video bitrate. Leave empty for no limit.
compress.codecHint: H.264: Лучшая совместимость. H.265: Меньший размер файла (до 50% меньше), но может не воспроизводиться на старых устройствах.
compress.codecHevcNotSupported: H.265 (HEVC) не поддерживается вашим браузером. Будет использован H.264.

faq.a1: The tool re-encodes the video using H.264 with a CRF (Constant Rate Factor) value. In Simple Mode, choose High (CRF 23), Medium (CRF 28), or Low (CRF 35). In Advanced Mode, set CRF manually from 0 to 51, plus encoding speed, resolution, frame rate, audio bitrate, and an optional max bitrate cap.
faq.q2: What is the difference between Simple and Advanced Mode?
faq.a2: Simple Mode offers three one-click presets (High, Medium, Low) optimized for common scenarios. Advanced Mode gives full control over CRF quality, encoding speed (ultrafast to veryslow), output resolution, frame rate, audio bitrate, and maximum video bitrate — ideal for users who need precise control.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm. Your data never leaves your device — nothing is uploaded to any server.
faq.q4: Can I upscale my video to a higher resolution?
faq.a4: No, and by design. Resolution and frame rate options that exceed the source video are automatically disabled. Upscaling would increase file size without improving actual quality. The tool only downscales to reduce file size.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.
faq.a6: Можно загрузить любой формат, который поддерживает ваш браузер: MP4, WebM, MOV, MKV, AVI. Вывод всегда в MP4 (H.264 + AAC).
faq.a7: Типичная степень сжатия — от 30% до 80%. Видео 100 МБ при среднем качестве (CRF 28) обычно уменьшается до 20–40 МБ.
faq.a8: Да, в любом современном мобильном браузере с поддержкой SharedArrayBuffer — Chrome, Edge, Firefox и Safari 16.4+.

intro.title: What is Compress Video?
intro.content:
Compress Video is a powerful browser-based video compressor that reduces file size without uploading to any server. Choose from three quality presets for quick compression, or switch to Advanced Mode for full control over CRF, encoding speed, resolution, frame rate, audio bitrate, and max bitrate cap.

Powered by FFmpeg.wasm with H.264/AAC encoding — the output plays everywhere. The tool displays detailed video metadata (resolution, duration, bitrate, FPS) and shows a side-by-side comparison after compression.

howToUse.title: How to Use Compress Video
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file — the tool instantly shows resolution, duration, bitrate, and frame rate
  2. Choose Simple Mode (High / Medium / Low presets) or switch to Advanced Mode to fine-tune CRF, encoding speed, resolution, FPS, and audio bitrate
  3. Click Compress — a progress bar tracks the encoding
  4. Compare source vs. compressed video: file size, resolution, bitrate, and reduction percentage
  5. Preview the compressed video and download it

Resolution and frame rate options that exceed the source are automatically disabled to prevent unnecessary upscaling.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Simple & Advanced Modes: Quick presets for beginners; full parameter control for power users
  • Video Metadata Display: See resolution, duration, bitrate, and FPS for both source and compressed video
  • Smart Upscale Prevention: Options exceeding the source resolution or frame rate are disabled
  • Adjustable CRF: Fine-tune quality factor from 0 (lossless) to 51
  • 9 Encoding Speeds: From Ultra Fast to Very Slow — slower = smaller file at same quality
  • Resolution & FPS Control: Downscale to 1080p, 720p, 480p, or 360p; reduce frame rate to 30, 24, or 15 fps
  • Audio Bitrate Selection: Choose from 64k to 256k AAC audio
  • Max Bitrate Cap: Optionally limit peak video bitrate for streaming compatibility
  • Side-by-Side Comparison: Full before/after stats table with compression percentage
  • H.264 + AAC Output: MP4 format for universal device compatibility

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Email Attachments: Compress videos under 25 MB for Gmail, Outlook, or corporate mail
  • Messaging Apps: Shrink videos for WhatsApp (16 MB limit), Telegram, Signal, or iMessage
  • Social Media: Optimize file size for faster uploads to Instagram, TikTok, X, or YouTube
  • Cloud Storage: Reduce file size to save Google Drive, Dropbox, or iCloud space
  • Web & CMS Upload: Meet upload size limits for WordPress, Shopify, or custom portals
  • Video Archiving: Compress large recordings with High Quality preset for long-term storage
  • Low-Bandwidth Sharing: Use Low Quality preset for quick transfer over slow connections

privacy.title: Privacy-First Video Compression
privacy.content:
Every video is compressed entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm (WebAssembly). No file is ever uploaded to any server.

  • Zero server contact — your video data stays on your device from start to finish
  • No accounts or sign-ups — just open the page and compress
  • Works offline after the one-time FFmpeg core download (~31 MB, cached by your browser)
  • Perfect for confidential footage: security cameras, medical recordings, legal evidence

f1.title: Простой и расширенный режим
f1.description: Пресеты одним кликом или полный контроль над CRF, скоростью, разрешением и битрейтом.

f2.title: 100% в браузере
f2.description: Видео не покидает ваше устройство. Работает на FFmpeg.wasm без контакта с сервером.

f3.title: Сравнение до/после
f3.description: Размер файла, разрешение, битрейт и коэффициент сжатия до и после.

f5.title: 9 скоростей кодирования
f5.description: От Сверхбыстрого до Очень Медленного — обменяйте время кодирования на меньший размер файла.

f6.title: Универсальный вывод MP4
f6.description: Кодирование H.264 + AAC обеспечивает воспроизведение на всех устройствах и платформах.

whySection.title: Зачем сжимать видео?
whySection.content:
Большие видеофайлы — главная причина возврата писем, ошибок загрузки и переполнения облачного хранилища.

  • Лимиты почты: Gmail 25 МБ, Outlook 20 МБ.
  • Мессенджеры: WhatsApp 16 МБ.
  • Соцсети: Instagram, TikTok и YouTube пережимают загрузки.
  • Стоимость облака: Оплата за ГБ.
  • Быстрая передача: 50 МБ за секунды vs минуты для 500 МБ.
  • Встраивание в веб: Сжатые видео загружаются быстрее.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Перетащите любой файл — MP4, WebM, MOV, MKV или AVI. Разрешение, длительность, битрейт и fps отображаются мгновенно.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Простой режим (Высокое/Среднее/Низкое) одним кликом или Расширенный для полного контроля.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Сравните статистику до/после, посмотрите результат в браузере и скачайте меньший MP4.

format-convert.name: Конвертер видеоформатов
format-convert.description: Конвертируйте видео между форматами MP4, MKV и AVI.
format-convert.metaDescription: Конвертируйте видео между форматами MP4, MKV и AVI. Бесплатный онлайн-инструмент, без загрузки. Работает в браузере.
format-convert.keywords: конвертер видео, конвертировать видео, mkv в mp4, avi в mp4, формат видео
format-convert.unsupported: Для этого инструмента требуется поддержка SharedArrayBuffer. Используйте современный браузер с HTTPS.
format-convert.codecHint: H.264: Лучшая совместимость. H.265: Меньший размер файла (до 50% меньше), но может не воспроизводиться на старых устройствах.
format-convert.codecHevcNotSupported: H.265 (HEVC) не поддерживается вашим браузером. Будет использован H.264.
format-convert.mkvStreamCopy: MKV использует режим копирования потока — без перекодировки, сохраняется оригинальное качество.
format-convert.mkvTranscode: Кодек отличается от исходного видео, будет перекодирован. Выберите тот же кодек, что и источник, для быстрой конвертации без потерь.

faq.a1: Вы можете конвертировать между форматами MP4, WebM, MKV и AVI. MP4 и AVI используют кодировку H.264, WebM — VP9, MKV — копирование потока для быстрой конвертации.
faq.a2: Конвертация в MKV использует копирование потока, поэтому качество сохраняется полностью. Другие конвертации перекодируют с высоким качеством.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: Нет. Вся обработка происходит полностью в вашем браузере. Ваши данные никогда не покидают ваше устройство — ничего не загружается на сервер.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: Что такое Convert Video Format?
intro.content:
Convert Video Format transforms videos between popular formats: MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI. Need to convert a WebM recording to MP4 for wider compatibility? Or an AVI to WebM for web use? This tool handles it.

Powered by FFmpeg.wasm for reliable format conversion in your browser.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Convert Video Format
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file in any supported format
  2. Select the target format: MP4, WebM, MKV, or AVI
  3. Click Convert to start processing
  4. Download the converted video

MP4 (H.264) is recommended for maximum compatibility across devices and platforms.

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Four Formats: Convert between MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI
  • H.264 Encoding: MP4 output uses H.264 for universal compatibility
  • VP8/VP9 for WebM: Proper codec selection for each format
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional encoding in the browser
  • Preview: Play the converted video before downloading
  • Audio Preservation: Audio track is properly transcoded

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Compatibility: Convert WebM screen recordings to universally playable MP4
  • Web Optimization: Convert videos to WebM for smaller file sizes on the web
  • Legacy Support: Convert modern formats to AVI for older media players
  • Editing: Convert to a format your video editor supports
  • Cross-Platform: Ensure videos play on any device or platform

privacy.title: Обработка с защитой конфиденциальности Video Conversion
privacy.content:
Format conversion runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

  • Your videos never leave your device
  • No server processing or cloud encoding
  • Работает в автономном режиме после FFmpeg core is loaded

faq.a1: 720p (1280px по ширине), 480p (854px по ширине) и 360p (640px по ширине). Вы также можете ввести произвольную ширину.
faq.a2: Да, высота автоматически рассчитывается для сохранения исходных пропорций.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: Нет. Вся обработка происходит полностью в вашем браузере. Ваши данные никогда не покидают ваше устройство — ничего не загружается на сервер.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: Что такое Resize Video?
intro.content: Resize Video changes video resolution with preset options (720p, 480p, 360p) or custom dimensions. Downscale large videos for web, mobile, or social media, or adjust resolution for specific platform requirements.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Resize Video
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file
  2. Select a preset resolution (720p, 480p, 360p) or enter custom dimensions
  3. Click Resize to process
  4. Download the resized video

Aspect ratio is maintained automatically to prevent distortion.

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Preset Resolutions: Quick-select 720p, 480p, or 360p
  • Custom Dimensions: Enter specific width and height
  • Aspect Ratio Lock: Automatically maintains video proportions
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional-grade video scaling
  • Multiple Formats: Resize MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI
  • Preview: Play the resized video before downloading

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Social Media: Resize for Instagram, TikTok, or YouTube requirements
  • Mobile Optimization: Downscale 4K/1080p videos for mobile viewing
  • Web Embedding: Resize for optimal web player dimensions
  • Storage Savings: Reduce resolution to save storage space
  • Email: Downscale videos for email-friendly file sizes

privacy.title: Обработка с защитой конфиденциальности Video Resizing
privacy.content:
Video resizing runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

  • Your videos never leave your device
  • No server processing or uploads
  • Работает в автономном режиме после FFmpeg core is loaded

info.name: Информация о видео

info.metaTitle: Информация о видео - Просмотр метаданных видео онлайн
info.metaDescription: Анализируйте видеофайлы: кодек, разрешение, битрейт, аудиопотоки и другое. Без загрузки. Бесплатный онлайн-инструмент.
info.keywords: информация о видео, метаданные видео, видеокодек, медиаинформация, инспектор видео
info.unsupported: Этот инструмент требует поддержки SharedArrayBuffer. Используйте современный браузер с HTTPS.

faq.q1: What information can this tool detect?
faq.a1: It detects video codec (H.264, VP9, AV1, etc.), audio codec (AAC, Opus, MP3, etc.), resolution, frame rate, bitrate, pixel format, sample rate, channel layout, and container format.
faq.a2: Most common formats including MP4, WebM, MKV, AVI, MOV, and more are supported through FFmpeg.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device — nothing is uploaded to any server.
faq.q4: How is this different from just checking file properties?
faq.a4: Operating system file properties usually show only basic information like file size and type. This tool uses FFmpeg to extract detailed stream-level metadata including exact codec, profile, pixel format, and per-stream bitrates.
faq.q5: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a5: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.

intro.title: What is Video Info?
intro.content: Video Info is a free online tool that inspects and displays detailed metadata from your video files.

howToUse.title: How to Use Video Info
howToUse.content:
1. Upload your video file.
  2. View basic metadata instantly.
  3. Click Analyze Video for deep inspection.
  4. Copy all metadata as text.

privacy.title: Privacy-First Video Inspection
privacy.content: Video analysis runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.
